message:
Improve service worker offline error handling

Enhance the service worker's fetch event handler to properly handle
network failures with explicit error responses instead of failing
silently or propagating exceptions.

Changes:
- Convert promise chains to async/await for cleaner error handling
- Wrap fetch calls in try/catch blocks
- Return proper 503 Service Unavailable responses when offline:
  - For static assets: plain text "Offline" response
  - For navigation: HTML fallback or cached homepage
- Ensure all code paths return a valid Response object

This improves user experience when the network is unavailable by
providing meaningful feedback instead of browser error pages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
